title: Updated GPU Lab Policy
text:
The GPU lab is open on Tuesdays and Thursdays from 18:00 to 20:00 for supervised project work. 
Students should book a slot through the course chat one day in advance. 
This policy was added after the original handbook and should appear in the updated knowledge base.

title: Late Submission Policy
text:
Late submissions are accepted up to 48 hours after the deadline with a documented reason and a visible commit history. 
After that window, the homework is reviewed only at the instructor's discretion. 
This update clarifies the earlier submission rules and changes retrieval results for deadline-related questions.

title: HW14 Specific Note
text:
For HW14 the required artifacts are retrieval_eval.csv, rag_examples.csv, and retrieval_before_after_update.csv. 
The notebook should demonstrate chunking, vectorization, a FAISS index, retrieval evaluation, knowledge base update, and a mini-RAG answer with sources. 
This note was added later to make the retrieval homework requirements more explicit.
